mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dorm_checkin_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND checkin_status = 1 ORDER BY checkin_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT cr.* FROM dorm_checkin_record cr LEFT JOIN dorm_bed db ON cr.bed_id = db.bed_id LEFT JOIN dorm_room dr ON db.room_id = dr.room_id WHERE dr.building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY cr.checkin_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_checkin_record (student_id, bed_id, checkin_time, checkin_status, operator_id, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{bedId}, #{checkinTime}, #{checkinStatus}, #{operatorId}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dorm_checkin_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND checkin_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dorm_checkin_record WHERE bed_id = #{bedId} AND checkin_status = 1
